title: Spelunky
creator: Derek Yu
description: The game's creator recounts its development while discussing randomization, difficulty, feedback, team dynamics, and finishing a project.
useful: Unusually direct access to the reasoning and compromises behind one independent game.
audience: Independent developers who want a candid account of designing and finishing one game.
learning: Develop difficulty and randomization through iteration
Use feedback to make demanding systems legible
Understand how a solo project grows into a team production
